name: Snapsheet Claims Automation API
what_it_does: Snapsheet REST API for cloud-based auto and property insurance claims management and virtual appraisal platform. Enables AI agents to manage claim intake and FNOL processing for auto and property insurance, handle virtual appraisal and photo damage assessment workflow automation, access AI-powered damage detection and repair estimate generation, retrieve claim status and lifecycle tracking for adjuster and customer communication, manage rental and total loss settlement workflow data, handle repair shop and vendor assignment for DRP (Direct Repair Program) networks, access payment disbursement and settlement processing for claims resolution, retrieve supplement and re-inspection workflow management data, manage claims analytics and cycle time performance metrics, and integrate claims data with core insurance systems, CRM, and payment platforms.
use_cases: Processing auto claim FNOL from claims automation agents
Retrieving AI damage estimates from virtual appraisal agents
Managing DRP shop assignments from claims workflow agents
Tracking claim cycle time from claims analytics agents
not_for: Commercial property insurance without auto and personal lines claims focus
Workers compensation without auto and property damage claims context
General claims software without virtual appraisal and photo damage assessment
best_when: An auto or property insurer using Snapsheet wants AI agents to automate FNOL intake, virtual appraisal workflows, damage estimation, shop assignment, settlement processing, and claims analytics.
avoid_when: REGULATORY RISK: Automated insurance claims settlement requires compliance with state prompt payment laws — settlement delays caused by automation failures trigger statutory interest penalties. AI damage estimates require adjuster review before settlement offers; automated settlements without adjuster sign-off violate insurance regulations. Photo-based estimates have accuracy limitations for hidden damage.

auth.notes: Snapsheet uses OAuth 2.0 authentication. Per-insurer API credentials. Documentation at snapsheet.me/developers. Webhooks for claim status events. REST API with JSON responses. Cloud-native on AWS. AI-powered virtual estimating with photo capture. Integration with major insurance carriers and MGAs.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-claim and annual subscription pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-claim transaction pricing with annual platform fee; volume pricing for high claim volumes
pricing.notes: Chicago, Illinois. Founded 2013. Private ($100M+ funding). Insurance claims technology market. 50+ insurance carrier clients. Virtual appraisal and photo estimating for auto and property. AI-first claims processing platform. Known for reducing claims cycle time. Competes with CCC Intelligent Solutions and Mitchell for claims technology market.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in API reference

known_agent_gotchas: REGULATORY RISK: Automated claims settlement must comply with state prompt payment laws; automation failures causing delays trigger statutory interest; implement SLA monitoring
AI estimate accuracy — photo-based estimates have ~10-15% variance from actual repair costs; automated settlement offers based on AI estimates require adjuster review
Hidden damage limitation — virtual appraisal cannot detect hidden structural or mechanical damage; automated total loss and supplement decisions need human review
State regulatory compliance — settlement automation varies by state; some states require specific disclosure language and adjuster licensing for settlement authority
DRP network configuration — Direct Repair Program shop assignment requires carrier-specific DRP network configuration; validate shop eligibility before automated assignment
Webhook for claim events — use webhooks for claim status changes, estimate completion, and settlement events; polling is inefficient for high claim volume
agent_readiness.security_notes: Insurance claims automation. SOC2, GDPR, CCPA. OAuth2. US. Insurance claims and vehicle damage data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Claims automation. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2. US. Insurance claims and damage assessment data.
